commit_message:
[RTL/Val] clear kv ctrl reg with zeroize + add all-zero KV seed detection + ACVP rejection KATs [RTL/Val] clear kv ctrl reg with zeroize + add all-zero KV seed detection + ACVP rejection KATs This PR addresses two issues:

  1. Clear KV control registers on zeroize ([caliptra-rtl#1077](https://github.com/chipsalliance/caliptra-rtl/issues/1077))

  When a crypto operation fails, the KV write control register remains uncleared because the failure prevents tag generation, so the write FSM never
